title: machaerina australis
intro: Machaerina australis is a type of sedge, a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is traditionally used in Australian indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Machaerina australis include relief from skin irritations and infections, as well as a reduction in inflammation and swelling. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, as well as being used in topical applications, to harness its medicinal properties.
